items.title: Stripe Payment Products
items.note: Salam, / Context: Munib built Stripe payment product pages inside Liferun's GHL setup for internal payment processing. Khurram is recording a handoff Loom video to document the current state and bring the new CRM team (Ahmed + Ali) up to speed on how it was built and configured. / Deliverable: Review Khurram's handoff Loom once delivered, perform QA and due diligence on the existing Stripe product configuration in GHL, tweak any settings as needed, fix any bugs identified during testing, and process a test payment successfully to confirm the integration works end to end. / Dependencies: Blocked waiting on Khurram's handoff Loom video to be completed and shared. Once that's delivered, CRM team can proceed with QA immediately. / Done: Stripe payment products are fully functional in Liferun's GHL, all bugs (if any) are resolved, test payment processed successfully, and page is production ready. / @Ahmed Memon @Ali Shaheer / Assigned to: Ahmed Memon, Ali Shaheer

payload.updateBody:
Salam,

  • Context: Munib built Stripe payment product pages inside Liferun's GHL setup for internal payment processing. Khurram is recording a handoff Loom video to document the current state and bring the new CRM team (Ahmed + Ali) up to speed on how it was built and configured.
  • Deliverable: Review Khurram's handoff Loom once delivered, perform QA and due diligence on the existing Stripe product configuration in GHL, tweak any settings as needed, fix any bugs identified during testing, and process a test payment successfully to confirm the integration works end to end.
  • Dependencies: Blocked waiting on Khurram's handoff Loom video to be completed and shared. Once that's delivered, CRM team can proceed with QA immediately.
  • Done: Stripe payment products are fully functional in Liferun's GHL, all bugs (if any) are resolved, test payment processed successfully, and page is production ready.

@Ahmed Memon @Ali Shaheer

items.title: [Justice Consumer Law] Fix Zoho lead naming
items.note: Posts as a subitem under the existing JCL Reports item on Ads.

payload.updateBody:
Salam,

  • Fix the Zoho lead campaign naming convention so each incoming lead is tagged with the individual video name that generated it, not a generic campaign label.
  • Why: current naming makes it impossible to tell which specific video is driving contact rate, so the team can't tell which videos to make more of.
  • Feeds directly into the Zoho Voice automation work. Once done, the team will know which videos are worth reshooting.

@Nacer Amrouch

items.title: Lower-priced product ad angle
items.note: Salam, / Context: During the 7 / 14 Ads Team Weekly Sync, the team discussed testing a new creative angle for Billy Doe Meats that highlights their lower-priced product offerings. The current campaigns focus primarily on premium cuts, but there's an opportunity to capture price-conscious segments of their audience who may not be aware of the more affordable options in their product line. / Deliverable: Create and launch a new Meta ad set featuring lower-priced products (specific products TBD based on inventory / margin data from client). Creative should emphasize value and affordability while maintaining the brand's quality positioning. Test against existing premium-focused creative to measure performance differences across audience segments. / Dependencies: Need confirmation from Billy Doe Meats on which specific lower-priced SKUs to feature and current inventory levels for those products. Also requires review of margin data to ensure promoted products are commercially viable for advertising spend. / Done: New ad set is live on Meta with lower-priced product creative, initial performance data is being tracked, and baseline metrics are established for comparison against premium product campaigns. / @Ads Team @Khurram Jamil / Assigned to: Khurram Jamil, Ads Team

payload.updateBody:
Salam,

  • Context: During the 7/14 Ads Team Weekly Sync, the team discussed testing a new creative angle for Billy Doe Meats that highlights their lower-priced product offerings. The current campaigns focus primarily on premium cuts, but there's an opportunity to capture price-conscious segments of their audience who may not be aware of the more affordable options in their product line.
  • Deliverable: Create and launch a new Meta ad set featuring lower-priced products (specific products TBD based on inventory/margin data from client). Creative should emphasize value and affordability while maintaining the brand's quality positioning. Test against existing premium-focused creative to measure performance differences across audience segments.
  • Dependencies: Need confirmation from Billy Doe Meats on which specific lower-priced SKUs to feature and current inventory levels for those products. Also requires review of margin data to ensure promoted products are commercially viable for advertising spend.
  • Done: New ad set is live on Meta with lower-priced product creative, initial performance data is being tracked, and baseline metrics are established for comparison against premium product campaigns.

@Ads Team @Khurram Jamil

items.title: Creative Refresh
items.note: Update on existing 'New Subscription Box Creatives' subitem: July creative fatigue is dragging down a 4.56x ROAS Meta campaign. Haney sending fresh video/photo content; Sohib providing content/segmentation recommendations. Assigned to: Ads Team.

payload.updateBody:
Salam,

  • Update from the 7/17 90 day review call with Haney and Hoda: Meta ads have driven a 4.56x ROAS over the test period, but creative fatigue set in during July and is already dragging performance down.
  • Haney is sending fresh video and photo content for new creatives. Use it alongside Sohib's content and segmentation recommendations to refresh the subscription box creative set.
  • Keep messaging unified across Muslim and mainstream audiences, no explicit segmentation, per the brand direction confirmed on the call.
  • Waiting on client: Haney to send video/photo assets before new creatives can go live.

@Ads Team

items.title: Sales Dashboard
items.note: New subitem under 'Website' parent: reporting dashboard integrating Shopify sales data with Meta ad performance so ROAS/margin can be tracked in one place, supporting holiday campaign planning. Assigned to: Muhammad Hashir Faiz, Zayan Faiz.

payload.updateBody:
Salam,

  • New deliverable from the 7/17 BillyDoe Meats review: build a reporting dashboard that integrates Shopify sales data with Meta ad performance so ROAS and profit margin (currently 18 to 30%) can be tracked in one place.
  • This supports the client's push toward holiday campaign planning and closer budget tracking as the account scales.
  • Done when the dashboard is live and pulling both Shopify and Meta data automatically.

@Muhammad Hashir Faiz @Zayan Faiz
